title: OpenCode XSS to RCE via unsanitized web UI URL parameter
description: The defaultServerUrl function in the OpenCode web UI reads a ?url= query parameter from the browser location and uses it as the backend server URL without any validation. An attacker can craft a link pointing the UI at a malicious server that returns unsanitized HTML in LLM responses, achieving XSS. From XSS, the attacker reaches the /pty/ WebSocket endpoints to spawn arbitrary processes on the host, escalating to full RCE.
